title: Squirrel Removal in NoHo, Manhattan | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in NoHo, Manhattan. Humane trapping, exclusion & damage repair. Serving historic lofts & buildings. Call for fast service!
intro: Squirrels infiltrating your NoHo loft or historic building? Best Pest Control NYC provides expert squirrel removal services throughout this creative Manhattan neighborhood. Our humane removal methods protect both your property and NoHo's urban wildlife, with pricing ranging from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation.
whyUs: With over a decade serving NoHo's unique mix of cast-iron buildings and modern residences, we understand the specific challenges posed by squirrels in this historic district. Our licensed technicians provide same-day service and guarantee all exclusion work to prevent future intrusions.
localContext: NoHo's beautiful 19th-century buildings and tree-lined streets near Bond Street and Lafayette create ideal conditions for squirrel activity, especially in older structures with accessible rooflines and architectural details. The neighborhood's proximity to parks and the blend of residential lofts with commercial spaces means squirrels often seek shelter in attics, chimneys, and building voids during colder months.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in NoHo?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in NoHo typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on factors like the number of squirrels, entry points, property size, and extent of damage. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are squirrels common in NoHo buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels are quite common in NoHo due to the neighborhood's mature trees and historic architecture with accessible rooflines. Cast-iron buildings and older lofts often have gaps and openings that squirrels exploit to nest in attics and wall voids, especially during fall and winter.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my NoHo property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service throughout NoHo. Most squirrel removal projects are completed within 3-7 days, including trapping, removal, exclusion work, and sanitization. Timeline varies based on colony size and building complexity.

faqs.question: Do you repair damage caused by squirrels in NoHo lofts?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide comprehensive damage repair including insulation replacement, wire repair, wood restoration, and sealing all entry points. Our team is experienced working with NoHo's historic buildings and ensures all repairs maintain the architectural integrity of your property.
